title: Hovsgol Januul
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hovsgol Januul''' were a branch of the [[Januul]] [[Alwari]] [[overclan]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. Their elders sat among the [[Januul Council of Elders|councils]] that were second in power to those of the ruling overclan of the [[Borokii]], with whom they had constantly clashed for generations. Their warriors were considered to be the finest of all the Januul and its subclans.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], at the conclusion of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|mission to Ansion]], an elite Alwari [[honor guard]] was gifted to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] who had come to achieve an accord between the [[Ansionian]] urbanites and the Alwari tribes, one that would protect the planet from [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|secession]] and ensure its retention within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

The honor guard, charged to shadow and protect the Jedi at all costs until they had seen the Ansionian secession vote of the representatives of the [[Unity of Community]] to its conclusion, was composed not only of the Hovsgol Januul's finest [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], but also of those of the [[Situng Borokii]], the preeminent subclan of Januul-overclan rival, the ruling Borokii.

In the [[Cuipernam]] [[Second skirmish in Cuipernam|skirmish]] with [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin|Soergg]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|hunters]] and [[Sniper/Legends|snipers]], the Hovsgol Januul warriors fought alongside their once feuding tribal enemies, now their elite brethren, of the Situng Borokii. Because of the honor guard's valiant defense, the Jedi overcame their malicious assailants and met at last with the [[Unity Council]], who accepted the Alwari accord. Ansion voted to remain with the Republic, and the Jedi found successful closure to a critical mission.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
